summary: 已按 review round 1 要求把 ReviewIntegrator 真正接入 HybridExperimentalPipeline._review_ambiguous()：当输入为 CandidateFilterResult/FilteredCandidate 列表时，会在 enable_enhancement 打开后调用 Qwen3-VL review worker，仅处理 ambiguous candidate，并把 review 后的 filtered_candidates、merge_decisions、review_metrics、review_warnings 回写到 pipeline run 上下文；无可 review 输入时保留原有兜底行为。
tests: TMPDIR=/private/tmp PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/private/tmp/chiralium-pyc PYTEST_ADDOPTS='-p no:cacheprovider' /Users/linsuchang/Desktop/work/chiralium/backend/.venv/bin/python -m pytest /Users/linsuchang/Desktop/work/chiralium/backend/tests/test_hybrid_pipeline.py /Users/linsuchang/Desktop/work/chiralium/backend/tests/test_review_integrator.py -q  -> 7 passed
risks: 当前 hybrid_pipeline 其余步骤仍为骨架实现；本轮仅完成 review 扩展点接线，不包含 question region/candidate extract/filter/merge 的端到端主流程实现。
